headline: Axios Library Compromised by Remote Access Trojan
lede: A series of malicious updates to the popular Axios library has introduced backdoors into developer environments. By targeting maintainer accounts, attackers successfully injected code designed to exfiltrate data and evade forensic analysis.

headline: Ollama Adopts MLX for Enhanced Apple Silicon Performance
lede: Ollama now leverages Apple's MLX framework to optimize local model inference. This architectural shift utilizes unified memory to boost performance and support advanced quantization formats.

headline: Questions Mount Over Artemis II Heat Shield Safety
lede: Despite clear structural degradation observed during the previous flight, NASA moves forward with a crewed lunar mission. Critics argue that political pressure is eclipsing the engineering realities of the Orion heat shield.

headline: Thousands of Ransomware Claims Recorded in One Year
lede: Data spanning twelve months reveals a persistent, fragmented threat landscape across global industrial sectors. Analysis confirms that a small subset of threat actors drives a significant volume of modern digital extortion.

headline: Source Map Exposure Reveals Anthropic Claude Code Internals
lede: A configuration oversight in the npm registry has exposed internal source code for Claude Code. The leak provides an unintended look at the project's state management and conditional logic.

headline: Reducing AI Verbosity with Universal Claude Configuration
lede: The Universal Claude.md project offers a template to curb sycophantic model outputs and excessive filler. By enforcing token constraints, users aim to streamline coding agent interactions.

headline: Government Mobile Apps Raise Concerns Over Data Collection
lede: A review of federal applications reveals extensive tracking capabilities embedded within government-issued software. These tools frequently capture sensitive biometric and location data under the guise of functionality.

headline: Google Introduces TimesFM for Time-Series Foundation Modeling
lede: Google Research has released a decoder-only foundation model optimized for temporal forecasting tasks. By reducing parameter count and expanding context windows, the system aims to improve accuracy in data analysis.

headline: The Cognitive Importance of Writing Your Own Work
lede: The tendency to delegate documentation to large language models threatens to erode personal intellectual authority. Authors argue that the act of writing remains a vital requirement for clear, independent thought.
pullquote: Outsourcing the act of writing ultimately leads to intellectual stagnation and a loss of personal authority

headline: Documentary Chronicles the Origins of Clojure Language
lede: A forthcoming film traces the evolution of Clojure, highlighting the functional paradigms championed by Rich Hickey. The documentary explores the language's impact on the JVM ecosystem since its 2007 debut.
